'''Faldos''' was a dirty backwater [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] used by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] to sell stolen weapons, armor, and technology. It sat on the very edge of the galaxy, making it far more removed than most of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

The planet was [[Battle of Faldos|attacked]] by [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] invaders in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
